# WishlistCart

> WishlistCart is a universal wishlist and gift registry platform. Users can save products from any online store by pasting a URL, track prices automatically, coordinate gifts with friends and family, and create registries for any occasion — weddings, baby showers, birthdays, holidays, and more.

WishlistCart is free to start with a Pro plan available for advanced features like unlimited price alerts, advanced analytics, and AI Gift Concierge.

## Core Features

- **Universal wishlist**: Add products from any online store (Amazon, Target, Etsy, IKEA, and thousands more) by pasting a URL
- **Price tracking**: Automatic price monitoring with email alerts when items drop in price
- **Gift coordination**: Share wishlists via a single link; friends can claim items privately without spoiling the surprise (Surprise Mode)
- **Gift registries**: Create registries for weddings, baby showers, and any occasion with group gifting and cash fund support
- **AI Gift Concierge**: Conversational AI advisor that recommends personalized gifts based on recipient, budget, and occasion
- **Browser extension**: Chrome extension to add items to wishlists from any website
- **Public API**: REST API for developers and e-commerce integrations

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://wishlistcart.com) — Product overview, features, and sign up
- [Pricing](https://wishlistcart.com/pricing) — Free vs Pro plan comparison
- [Gift Marketplace](https://wishlistcart.com/marketplace) — Curated product discovery by category
- [Explore](https://wishlistcart.com/explore) — Discover public wishlists from the community
- [Gift Finder](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-finder) — AI-powered gift recommendation quiz
- [Developers](https://wishlistcart.com/developers) — Public REST API documentation
- [For Business](https://wishlistcart.com/corporate) — Corporate gifting and team features
- [Browser Extension](https://wishlistcart.com/browser-extension) — Chrome extension for one-click saving

## Gift Guides

WishlistCart publishes curated gift guides for every occasion and recipient:

- [Gifts for Mom](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/mom)
- [Gifts for Dad](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/dad)
- [Gifts for Wife](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/wife)
- [Gifts for Husband](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/husband)
- [Wedding Registry Ideas](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/wedding)
- [Baby Shower Gifts](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/baby-shower)
- [Birthday Gift Ideas](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/birthday)
- [Christmas Gifts](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/for/christmas)
- [Gifts Under $50](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/under/50)
- [Gifts Under $100](https://wishlistcart.com/gift-ideas/under/100)

## Do Not Index

- /dashboard/ — Private user dashboard (requires authentication)
- /api/ — Internal API endpoints
- /onboarding/ — New user onboarding flow
